title: Add a SimpleBond deployment checklist helper
description: Create a helper under scripts/ that accepts SimpleBondV4 deployment context such as network, contract name, address, transaction hash, and block number, then prints the concrete post-deploy follow-ups the repo needs.

title: Print the checklist from the SimpleBond deploy flow
description: Update scripts/deploy.js so a successful SimpleBondV4 deployment still logs the address, transaction hash, and mined block number, then invokes the checklist helper automatically.

title: Verify checklist output and repo-specific guidance
description: Review or run the updated deployment path to confirm it prints the correct hardhat verify command and points operators to frontend/index.html, backend/config.mjs, and README.md without implying unsupported runtime networks are already wired through the product.
